use_cases: Displaying real-time global user distribution on a 3D globe
Showing live location markers for analytics dashboards
Creating interactive world map visualizations for SaaS platforms
Representing geographic data for fintech and analytics applications
Building immersive globe components for data storytelling
ai_summary: An interactive 3D globe component built with the Cobe WebGL library that displays location markers across major global cities. Features drag-to-rotate interaction, live viewer count simulation, and smooth animations. Supports custom markers and rotation speed parameters. Ideal for SaaS analytics dashboards, global user distribution visualizations, and data-driven presentations requiring geographic context.
